document.title: Essential Principles of Safety and Performance of Medical Devices

sourceSummary.oneLine: Essential Principles checklist for H&abyz Co., Ltd. medical device models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory submission by mapping applicable Essential Principles to conformity methods and specific supporting documents.
keyPoints: Product owner is identified as H&abyz Co., Ltd.
Applicable general requirements cite risk management, safety and essential performance testing, EMC, wireless EMC, RED, DQE testing, software validation, biocompatibility, and clinical evaluation.
The device is described as a digital imaging solution for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy.
Several biological, sterile, implantable, self-testing, and clinical investigation requirements are marked not applicable.
Checklist was prepared and approved on February 28, 2025.

evidence.claim: The listed product name is A1417MCW/A1717MCW/F1417MCW.
General requirement conformity includes risk management, safety testing, EMC, wireless EMC, RED, DQE testing, software validation, biocompatibility, and clinical evaluation.
evidence.evidenceText: 1. Risk Management 2. General safety and essential performance test 3. EMC test 4. (Wireless) EMC Test 5. Test related to RED (Directive 2014/53/EU) 6. Determination of the detective quantum efficiency test 7. Software Development & Validation report 8. Biocompatibility test 9. Clinical Evaluation
